name: freelook
description: Outlook desktop application powered by Tauri
author: Howard Ju <howard.ju@outlook.com>

scripts.clean: rm -rf src-tauri/target src-tauri/gen node_modules src/js-compiled dist build out release debug coverage tmp temp .cache .turbo .parcel-cache .next .nuxt .svelte-kit && find . -name .DS_Store -delete 2>/dev/null || true
scripts.clean:full: npm run clean && npm install && npm run build:ts
scripts.release: npm run release:check && npm run release:tag && npm run release:push
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync && npm run release
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync && npm run release
scripts.release:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && npm run release:sync && npm run release
scripts.release:check: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const c=require('./src-tauri/tauri.conf.json');if(p.version!==c.version){console.error('Version mismatch: package.json='+p.version+' tauri.conf.json='+c.version);process.exit(1)}console.log('Versions in sync: '+p.version)"
scripts.release:tag: git add package.json package-lock.json src-tauri/tauri.conf.json && git commit -m "release: v$(node -p \"require('./package.json').version\")" && git tag "v$(node -p \"require('./package.json').version\")"
